category_title: Students with externalizing behaviors and low frustration tolerance
scenario_title: Transitioning to academic tasks and minor upsets
minimal_context: The student is transitioning to afternoon key skills time and is instructed to start an academic task in their workbook.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time to transition to key skills. Please get your workbook out and make a start.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Oh, no, do we have to do key skills?

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Yes, we do. Please open your workbook.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Oh, no, why do I got to do work?

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to open the book. You skipped a page yesterday, so go back to page four.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Pushes back his chair) I'm not going back! (Runs out of the classroom)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time to transition to key skills. Please get your workbook out and make a start.

STUDENT: Oh, no, do we have to do key skills?

TUTOR: Yes, we do. Please open your workbook.

STUDENT: Oh, no, why do I got to do work?

TUTOR: You need to open the book. You skipped a page yesterday, so go back to page four.

STUDENT: (Pushes back his chair) I'm not going back! (Runs out of the classroom)

task.content: Transitioning to 'key skills' (academic work) time and starting an academic task in a workbook

context.environment: Mainstream classroom lesson and afternoon nurture group session, with access to a quiet place
context.social_setting: General school day activities in a mainstream classroom setting
context.time_context: Transitioning to afternoon key skills time

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When anything upset him, which might be the most miniscule thing
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: He'd push back his chair and run out of the classroom
related_quotes: anything that upset him, and it might be the most miniscule thing, he'd push back his chair and run out of the classroom.

behavior_patterns.condition: When transitioning to key skills time or being asked to do work
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Verbal complaints, non-compliance with teacher instructions, and work output being basically nil
related_quotes: oh, no, do we have to do key skills
oh, no, why do I got to do work
